Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SecurityHealthCheckRisks

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SecurityHealthCheckRisks
public class SecurityHealthCheckRisks extends SObject

Java class for SecurityHealthCheckRisks complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SecurityHealthCheckRisks">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrgValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrgValueRaw" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RiskType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SecurityHealthCheck" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SecurityHealthCheck" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SecurityHealthCheckId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Setting" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SettingGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SettingRiskCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StandardValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StandardValueRaw" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
